RADM30 Hospital readmission within 30 days Indicator for whether an unplanned readmission for any cause followed within 30 days from the date of hospital discharge 61 Num 8 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay=1 or SSP_ADM=1. Equals 1 if beneficiary has unplanned readmission for any cause followed within 30 days from the date of hospital discharge. Does not apply to beneficiaries
